prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 13544→15615→15373→21450→17653 名，整体呈波动上行趋势；2024 年出现异常高位（约 21450 名），2025 年明显回落至约 17653 名，近两年波动幅度较大；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 47、48、47、47、48 人，基本稳定在 47–48 人；2026 年计划增至 51 人，较 2025 年扩招约 6.3%，招生名额增加使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 89 名，近年排名在 84–92 之间波动，整体层次稳定；该校在抖音热度排名第 83 位，评价为「一般」，综合热度中等偏低；声誉文件中未见长安大学相关负面舆情记录，学校社会形象平稳；交通运输工程为 A- 级学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校核心王牌专业，与车辆工程、道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通工程等招生专业直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高，长安大学在上述领域均有招生，有利于吸引高分考生；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望，可能对相关专 业报考热度产生一定抑制。辽宁省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20 万，与 2025 年（物理类约 14.3 万）基本持平，考生规模无明显变化，未出现大幅波动；长安大学位于陕西省西安市，属西部高校；在辽宁省招生计划占比较小（约 50 人左右），跨省报考的地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次已从 2024 年异常高位明显回落、2026 年小幅扩招约 6.3% 使竞争略有加剧、考生规模基本持平、学校声誉平稳、优势学科（交通运输 A-）及热门工科专业持续吸引考生等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次约 18115 名，波动区间 17615–18615 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（计算机长安学堂计划）/计算机科学与技术
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 车辆工程
- 自动化类（自动化、机器人工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（智能制造工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、机械电子工程）
- 交通运输
- 道路桥梁与渡河工程
- 能源与动力工程
- 大数据管理与应用
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木类（土木工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程等）
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、材料成型及控制工程等）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学）
- 建筑类（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 17615–18615 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（<17615 名）可重点冲击一档的计算机类、电气工程及车辆工程等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>18615 名）应以三档专业保底为主，争取进入二档专业。长安大学以交通运输工程（A-）为学科核心，相关专业就业优势明显，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 13544→15615→15373→21450→17653, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend; in 2024, there was an abnormally high ranking (approximately 21450), and in 2025, it significantly dropped to about 17653, with large fluctuations in the past two years; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 47, 48, 47, 47, 48 respectively, basically stable at 47–48; in 2026, the plan increased to 51, an expansion of about 6.3% compared to 2025, and the increase in enrollment places slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings in 2026 is approximately 89th, fluctuating between 84–92 in recent years, with a stable overall level; the university ranks 83rd in Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with moderately low overall popularity; no negative public opinion records related to Chang'an University were found in the reputation documents, indicating a stable social image; Transportation Engineering is an A- level discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), which is the core flagship major of the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Vehicle Engineering, Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, and Traffic Engineering, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity, and Chang'an University enrolls students in these fields, which helps attract high-scoring candidates; the popularity of civil engineering and architecture majors is divided and wait-and-see, which may suppress the application enthusiasm for related majors to some extent. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province General College Entrance Examination is about 200,000, basically the same as in 2025 (about 143,000 for the Physics Category), with no significant change in the candidate pool and no large fluctuations; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a western university; its enrollment plan in Liaoning Province accounts for a small proportion (about 50 people), and the influence of regional preference factors for cross-province applications is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has significantly dropped from the abnormally high level in 2024, the small expansion of about 6.3% in 2026 slightly intensifies competition, the candidate pool is basically stable, the university's reputation is stable, and the advantageous disciplines (Transportation Engineering A-) and popular engineering majors continue to attract candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 18115, with a fluctuation range of 17615–18615.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer Chang'an Academy Plan)/Computer Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Vehicle Engineering
- Automation (Automation, Robotics Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering)
- Transportation
- Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Big Data Management and Application
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, etc.)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, etc.)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17615–18615, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<17615), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Vehicle Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>18615), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options and strive to enter Tier 2 majors. Chang'an University takes Transportation Engineering (A-) as its core discipline, and related majors have obvious employment advantages, which deserve special attention.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 2534→2636→2789→2325→2788 名，整体在 2325–2789 名区间内波动，无明显单边趋势；2025 年基准约 2788 名；该校在辽宁省历史类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 4、3、3、3、5 人，2025 年扩至 5 人；2026 年计划回落至 4 人，较 2025 年缩招 20%，名额减少使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 89 名，层次稳定；该校抖音热度评价为「一般」，综合热度中等偏低；声誉文件中未见长安大学相关负面舆情，社会形象平稳；长安大学以理工 科为主，历史类招生专业（新闻传播学类、工商管理类、建筑类、行政管理）与学校 A- 级优势学科交通运输工程关联度较低，学科支撑偏弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学类专业社会热度「明显劝退」（张雪峰效应持续），可能降低考生报考意愿；工商管理 类「分化观望」，报考热度一般。辽宁省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20 万，历史类考生规模与 2025 年（约 5.6 万）基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次约 2788 名、2026 年缩招 20% 使竞争略有缓解、新闻传播类专业明显劝退可能抑制报考热度、考生规模持平等因素，预计 2026 年历史类最低位次约 2503 名，波动区间 2052–2954 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2052–2954 名内，长安大学在辽宁省历史类招生仅 4 人，专业选择空间有限。位次优于区间下限（<2052 名）可冲刺一档专业；位次在区间中部建议以二档行政管理为主；位次接近区间上限（>2954 名）需谨慎报考。历史类考生应重点关注该校在辽宁省的实际招生计划人数较少这一风险因素。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2534→2636→2789→2325→2788, fluctuating within the range of 2325–2789 without a clear unilateral trend; the baseline for 2025 is about 2788. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 4, 3, 3, 3, and 5 students respectively, expanding to 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan drops back to 4 students, a 20% reduction compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition due to fewer slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking for 2026 is approximately 89th, with a stable level. Its Douyin popularity rating is 'average,' with overall moderate to low popularity; no negative public opinion related to Chang'an University is found in reputation documents, maintaining a stable social image. Chang'an University is primarily focused on science and engineering, and its History Category majors (Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Architecture, Administrative Management) have low correlation with the university's A- level advantageous discipline of Transportation Engineering, resulting in weak disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Journalism and Communication major has a social popularity of 'clearly discouraged' (the Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), potentially reducing candidates' willingness to apply; Business Administration is 'divided and wait-and-see,' with average application popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province general college entrance examination is about 200,000, with the number of History Category candidates roughly the same as in 2025 (about 56,000).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking of about 2788, the 20% enrollment reduction in 2026 slightly easing competition, the clearly discouraged Journalism and Communication major potentially suppressing application enthusiasm, and the stable candidate scale, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 2503, with a fluctuation range of 2052–2954.

- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 2052–2954, Chang'an University only enrolls 4 students in History Category in Liaoning Province, limiting major selection. Rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<2052) allow for a sprint to Tier 1 majors; rankings in the middle of the range suggest focusing on Tier 2 Administrative Management; rankings near the upper limit of the range (>2954) require cautious application. History Category candidates should pay special attention to the risk factor of the university's small actual enrollment plan in Liaoning Province.
